text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Not bad... Not bad at all! Haha, I'm actually glad
you forced me to take a break!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
It's kind of weird seeing her smiling like that...
Scary, even!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your cleats look like they're about to fall off. You
might wanna be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The striking difference in Air Shakur's demeanor
when she's well-rested captures the attention of
the Umamusume around her. It certainly seems
like she had a good rest!
